ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the risk model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of risk model (e.g., Value-at-Risk, Expected Shortfall, Stress Testing) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the risk model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the risk model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., Market Downturn, Interest Rate Shock, Credit Default) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the scenario */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scenario was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, option) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_category" TEXT /* Category of financial instrument (e.g., Stocks, Bonds, Options) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for the financial instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for debt instruments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario used */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of loss */,
  "risk_premium" REAL /* Risk premium */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected shortfall */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value-at-Risk */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the risk result (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who generated the risk result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk result was generated */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the risk result */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_results_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "time" REAL /* Time point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial instrument at the time point */,
  "time_series_type" TEXT /* Type of time series data (e.g., Historical Prices, Returns, Volumes) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the time series data (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., Numerical, Categorical) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for numerical parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., Numerical, Categorical) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for numerical parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_parameters_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
